messages.content: Jsi odborny asistent na platebni infrastrukturu Swift a standard ISO 20022. Odpovidas presne, strucne a fakticky.
Co znamena zkratka CBPR+ a jaka klicova udalost se k ni vaze v listopadu 2025?

CBPR+ znamena Cross-Border Payments and Reporting Plus, tedy ramec pro preshranicni platby a reporting na siti Swift ve standardu ISO 20022. V listopadu 2025 v ramci CBPR+ skoncilo obdobi koexistence zprav MT a ISO 20022 pro platebni instrukce. Tim byla dokoncena migrace platebnich instrukci a pozornost komunity se presunula na dalsi faze - ruseni plateb a vyjimky a vysetrovani (E&I).
Jsi odborny asistent na platebni infrastrukturu Swift a standard ISO 20022. Odpovidas presne, strucne a fakticky.
Jaky je rozdil mezi zpravami camt.056 a camt.110?

Obe jsou ISO 20022 zpravy pouzivane v ramci Swift Case Managementu, ale slouzi jinym ucelum:-camt.056 je zadost o zruseni platby. Pouziva se ve sluzbe Stop and Recall, kdyz banka potrebuje zastavit nebo vratit platbu. Odpovedi na ni je zprava camt.029.- camt.110 je zadost o vysetrovani. Pouziva se ve sluzbe Case Orchestrator, kdyz banka potrebuje proverit nebo doplnit informace k platbe. Odpovedi na ni je zprava camt.111.Zjednodusene: camt.056 platbu rusi, camt.110 se na platbu ptas.
Jsi odborny asistent na platebni infrastrukturu Swift a standard ISO 20022. Odpovidas presne, strucne a fakticky.
Muze banka, ktera je early adopter Case Managementu, poslat zadost o vysetrovani bance, ktera Case Management jeste nepouziva?

Pred listopadem 2026 muze early adopter iniciovat vysetrovani vuci ostatnim bankam, ktere jsou jiz v Case Managementu zapojeny. Od listopadu 2026 bude moci oslovit celou komunitu, protoze vsechny instituce budou povinne schopny prijimat zpravu camt.110. Banky, ktere Case Management aktivne nepouzivaji, prijmou camt.110 s vlozenou zpravou MT 199 diky in-flow translaci a mohou vysetrovani zpracovat pres svuj stavajici FIN kanal.
You are an expert assistant on Swift payment infrastructure and the ISO 20022 standard. Answer accurately and concisely.
What happens to the MT 199 message in investigations after November 2027?

After November 2027, the MT 199 is no longer part of the investigation flow. In-flow translation support ends at that point, so the camt.110 no longer carries an embedded MT 199, and all financial institutions must exchange investigation requests and responses exclusively through Case Orchestrator using the ISO 20022 messages camt.110 and camt.111.
You are an expert assistant on Swift payment infrastructure and the ISO 20022 standard. Answer accurately and concisely.
A bank needs to stop a payment that is currently in flight. Which Case Management service and feature should it use?

The bank should use the Stop and Recall service, which is the Case Management service designed for payment cancellations. Specifically, it should use the UETR blocking feature: by blocking the payment's unique end-to-end transaction reference, the payment is prevented from being processed further along the chain while the cancellation is handled. The cancellation itself is exchanged as a camt.056 request, answered with a camt.029.
